gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent PowerShell implementation using PSCustomObject and [ordered] for predictable JSON. The Bash test harness is exceptionally thorough, creating a mock git repo to run act. Workflow is well-structured with clear grouping and error validation. Adheres to all requested constraints.
